hero.title: The Next.js starter with billing and plan gating built in
hero.description: Other starters connect Stripe and stop. This one ships enforced plan gating - capability checks, usage limits, and feature access control tied to billing. It also shows how to apply the same pattern to AI-ready workflows without bolting on a second system.
hero.techStack: Next.js 16 · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind v4 · Prisma · Stripe · $149 one-time

cta.title: Stop rebuilding. Start shipping.
cta.description: Auth, billing, plan gating, teams, AI-ready monetization patterns, and 72 docs. Buy once, own the code, launch your SaaS this week.
cta.footer: One-time purchase · Full source code · 30-day refund policy

features.title: Everything you need to launch - nothing you need to learn
features.subtitle: Feature-organized code, not a custom framework. You already know the stack.

planGating.title: Plan Gating
planGating.description: Capability-based feature flags and usage limits. Gate any feature with one function call.

stripeBilling.title: Stripe Billing
stripeBilling.description: Subscriptions, one-time payments, per-seat billing. Three models out of the box.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Magic link, Google, and GitHub OAuth. Account linking and session management included.

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Multi-team support with roles, invitations, and member limits.

dashboardShell.title: Dashboard Shell
dashboardShell.description: Sidebar navigation, command menu, dark mode, and settings pages.

database.title: Database + ORM
database.description: PostgreSQL with Prisma. Migrations, seeds, and feature-split schema files.

settingsAccount.title: Settings + Account
settingsAccount.description: Profile editing, linked auth providers, theme switching, and account deletion.

aiAssistant.title: AI-ready Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Plan-gated assistant with real task actions, demo inbox, and invoice drafts.

crudExample.title: CRUD Example
crudExample.description: Full tasks module with TanStack Table, server actions, Zod, and plan-gated creation.

footer.tagline: The Next.js starter with auth, billing, and enforced plan gating built in. Buy once, own the code.
footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind v4.

screenshots.title: See what you're getting
screenshots.subtitle: Every screen is real, functional, and ready to customize.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing. Choose the plan that fits your team and start building today.
